title: Data Analyst / Data Engineer (m/w/d)
matched_skills: BI tools — Power BI (PL-300 certified), Qlik Sense, Looker Studio, SAP Analytics
Data analytics experience — 4+ years across multiple industries
Dashboard design — budget variance dashboards, performance reporting
Marketing analytics / tracking data context (campaign analytics, funnel analysis)
missing_skills: SQL / relational databases — not mentioned in CV (stated requirement)
ETL / Data Warehouse experience — not mentioned
Data lake / data management — not mentioned
key_requirements: Understanding of data structures and relational databases
Data lake / ETL experience a plus
cv_highlights: Power BI Microsoft Certified (PL-300), Qlik Sense, Looker Studio, SAP Analytics
4+ years data analytics across e-commerce, shipping, FinTech, IoT, manufacturing
Campaign analytics and funnel analysis (agency marketing context)
gaps: SQL not mentioned in CV — most important gap
No ETL or Data Warehouse experience
No data lake or data engineering background
overqualification_note: Role targets fresh graduates or ~2 years experience (€36K–€51K). Candidate has 4+ years experience and may be overqualified. Worth considering whether to apply.
recommendation: Moderate match on BI tools and analytics experience. SQL gap is the critical missing piece. Also note overqualification risk — salary range and seniority level are below candidate's current profile.
